subject: Sobble, a small aqueous lizard-like creature, partially submerged and surrounded by water and bubbles
description: A small, round, blue-tinted creature with wide eyes and a curled tail sits at the center of the image, surrounded by splashing water and iridescent bubbles on a vivid blue and aqua background. The art style is bright and cartoonish, conveying a sense of playful aquatic energy. The creature appears calm despite the dynamic water surrounding it.
foreground: small lizard-like creature surrounded by water droplets and bubbles
background: splashing water, aqua tones, light reflections
